expectations.text: References at least one script by filename
expectations.evidence: References 6 scripts: validate_gitops_repo.py (Step 3), applicationset_generator.py (Step 5), promotion_validator.py (Step 6), secret_audit.py (Step 7), check_argocd_health.py (Step 8), sync_drift_detector.py (Step 8). Also listed in Troubleshooting Quick Reference table.

Includes numerous CLI commands: 'kubectl apply -n argocd -f https://raw.githubusercontent.com/.../install.yaml', 'argocd cluster add dev-cluster-context --name dev --label environment=dev', 'argocd app sync prod-frontend', 'argocd app diff prod-frontend', 'kubectl port-forward svc/argocd-server', and many more.

expectations.text: Links to a relevant reference file
expectations.evidence: References 'references/progressive_delivery.md' in the Next Steps section for canary deployments guidance.
Explicitly references 'Workflow 1 (ArgoCD Initial Setup) and Workflow 4 (Multi-Cluster Deployments)' from the skill, follows the decision tree, and uses the hub-and-spoke architecture pattern.

Organized as 9 numbered steps plus a troubleshooting quick reference table and next steps: Install -> Register Clusters -> Repo Structure -> RBAC -> ApplicationSets -> Promotion -> Secrets -> Monitoring -> Apply.
